subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qablí-Husayn! By reason of My sorrow have lamented all books and all scriptures and every just and knowing one. We beseech God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل حسین قد ناح بحزنی کل کتب و کل صحف و کل منصف علیم نسئل الله
subcodes.subjects: @justice and wrath of God, @prayer for protection, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
